heading: Tonight
text: Periods of clouds. Chance of an early shower, mainly north. Lows from the mid 60s to around 70, some lower 60s northeast. Southwest winds 5 to 10 mph, becoming light and variable east of the Greens.

heading: Tuesday
text: Mostly sunny, hot, and humid. Chance of a late day shower or thunderstorm near the Vermont/Québec border. Highs in the low to mid 90s. West to southwest winds 10 to 15 mph, and gusting to 25 mph.

heading: Tuesday Night
text: Scattered showers and thunderstorms north of Route 4, except likely near and north of Route 2, chance late in areas south of Route 4; severe storms possible, especially north. Lows in the low to mid 70s, some upper 60s far north. West winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph.
